Fear and Greed is at
15
(Extreme
Fear)
and BTC is near
$63K
this morning, bouncing slightly after touching $59,200 on Friday,
its lowest price since October 2024. The total market cap holds
around
$2.16T
as the market looks for a floor.

What happens during a crash tells you a lot. Family offices and
sovereign wealth funds are calling the dip a buying opportunity.
One ETH treasury firm made its biggest purchase of the year into
the selloff. MetaMask just launched infrastructure for AI agents
to trade DeFi autonomously. And Sam Bankman-Fried filed a pardon
petition.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Institutions Are Buying Bitcoin While Everyone Else Sells

Coinbase's head of institutional strategy told CNBC on June 8
that family offices and sovereign wealth funds are actively
buying Bitcoin's price decline. BTC touched $59,200 on June 6,
roughly 50% below its October 2025 peak.

"They loved it at $125,000 and they love it even more at
$65,000," he said.

What price target has Bernstein set for Bitcoin despite the
current decline?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/wJue-WepYGN9iQApgTpdKg~~/AAQRxRA~/K8CRLJ8fnXnYw7LsaCz4upf4xO7RzwBXsLnEWn5cAf4meNuOXKp7k3thHmhYNSDaqypPeypV9l4mSWa86ZsegE23gliq-Ojnykih7oFkSSbx3wXiABN42fII68oC85dSSP-jt5788pPH7rJ4JyI34tRZAuSQujvt9dRgskby3j0~ )
   Tokenized Real-World Assets Just Grew Almost Sixfold

The number of active tokenized re

font-size: 36px; line-height: 44px; font-weight: 590; color: #000 !important; } .regular-text, .regular-text * { color: #000 !important; } [data-ogsc] .main-container { background-color: #fff !important; 74248.subject: Revolut’s $115 billion secondary share sale mints Europe’s first centicorn 🇪🇺🦄; OpenAI filed for its IPO becaus…
74248.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/fintechpulse1087

Hey Everyone,
Good morning & happy Tuesday! Today, all eyes are on FinTech giant Revolut, which is about to become Europe’s first centicorn (what the $750M-$2B secondary share sale at a $115B valuation is all about, why it matters & what to expect next + bonus deep dives into the latest financials of Revolut [ https://substack.com/redirect/2d09179b-0e34-4191-b2db-8e8005d0d986?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], Monzo [ https://substack.com/redirect/72a5516b-be56-4c56-b189-cc2a893595ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and Starling [ https://substack.com/redirect/32ae487d-bdc1-4cc9-bcb7-924250185e9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], & the list of top 100 AI & tech VCs of 2026 [ https://substack.com/redirect/ba4e2a06-3dea-4722-bfeb-2b7d9a7da437?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), and OpenAI that finally filed the paperwork for its blockbuster IPO (why listing after Anthropic could be critical, and why all eyes should actually be on SpaceX [ https://substack.com/redirect/83405be1-b8c0-4a8f-8af6-44b261ef682b?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] here + a closer look at the most dangerous IPO wave since 1999 [ https://substack.com/redirect/dc3c6af8-8e31-46c2-a325-b356b75eb476?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] & how OpenAI turned Codex into a Wall Street analyst [ https://substack.com/redirect/dc3c6af8-8e31-46c2-a325-b356b75eb476?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside). So let’s jump straight into the fascinating stuff 🌶️
Revolut’s $115 billion secondary share sale mints Europe’s first centicorn 🇪🇺🦄
Following the money 💸 FinTech giant Revolut is about to become Europe’s first centicorn, and Klarna $KLAR  shareholders might want to look away.
The London-based fintech is preparing a secondary share sale at a valuation of up to $115 billion, a 53% leap from the $75 billion it commanded just in November 2025. Investor demand is already strong enough to push the deal well past its initial $750 million target. Wild, but not too surprising… 😳
On the surface, the numbers tell a clean & impressive growth story: $6 billion in revenue, $2.3 billion in pre-tax profit [ https://substack.com/redirect/2d09179b-0e34-4191-b2db-8e8005d0d986?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and a trajectory that would make Revolut the most valuable private fintech on the planet.
But underneath the centicorn milestone sits a messier picture involving a co-founder’s sudden departure, a high-stakes U.S. bank charter application, and the uncomfortable reality that the last European fintech IPO of this magnitude ended in a bloodbath.
Let’s take a closer look at this, understand why it matters, and what to watch next...

Unsubscribe
